<!--
Thanks for contributing to MenuRay!

Before submitting, please make sure:
- You've read CONTRIBUTING.md
- `flutter analyze` and `flutter test` both pass clean
- Your commits follow the conventional commit format
-->

## What this PR does

A brief description of the change. Link to any related issue: Closes #123

## Why

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## How

High-level approach. If non-trivial, sketch the key decisions.

## Screenshots / demo

For UI changes, include before/after screenshots. For backend changes, include relevant request/response if applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] My commits follow the [conventional commit format](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `flutter analyze` reports no issues (from `frontend/merchant/`)
- [ ] `flutter test` passes (from `frontend/merchant/`)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or APIs changed
- [ ] If introducing a new dependency, I justified it above
- [ ] If breaking a documented interface, I noted it in the body

## Notes for reviewer

Anything else the reviewer should know — non-obvious decisions, areas to focus on, etc.
